name: 红色图标卡片式中文单页简历
description: A one-page Chinese resume template decomposed from examples/template1/source-preview.png.

module_slots.education: Education history card: school, badges, time, program, location, details.
module_slots.experience: Internship/work card: organization, role, time, project, labeled bullets.
module_slots.projects: Project card: project name, optional role/time, bullets.
module_slots.awards: Award/certificate card: award name on the left, time on the right.
